perspectives.transcript: "Oh yeah, Yvonne told me I should make these manuals and they're working out really well. Here, check it out. [Omsn Teaching Manual invoked] They're right here. And I can click on it and I will share my screen right now. The share everything relevant image and I just took a screenshot for this but. Could imagine, like the Kinta PDF. Pop up here and then you show someone. And the software tracks that you... That you invoked the dream node during the conversation."
